subject: WM-0105 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. Verified docs-only WM-0105 save policy preserves controlled-test draft status, Web import/export instructions, Windows/Web interoperability blocker, owner gates, M5 hash expectations and downstream citation boundaries; no runtime save schema migration, desktop bridge, broad IPC/filesystem, cloud/hosted save, telemetry, release/store/signing/installer/updater or M8 work found. Re-ran taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, corepack pnpm test --filter persistence, and corepack pnpm test --filter m5-save-replay.
